opinion.h1: FONK v. TOWN OF YORKVILLE, 358 U.S. 58 (1958)
opinion.h4: FONK ET AL. v. TOWN OF YORKVILLE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WISCONSIN. No. 332. Decided October 27, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Wm. J. P. Aberg for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
